result.status_detail: FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — chat shell loaded but assistant response area empty, 'Refresh Page' error UI shown; no '차단' warning visible. h2_end_stream 1→2 did not fix genspark SSE render.

notes: Iteration 2 of genspark Phase 6 warning-impl. Hypothesis: h2_end_stream 1→2 (delayed END_STREAM, matching zeta) would fix genspark SSE parser. Result: Same FAIL_NOT_RENDERED as iter 1 (#947). Post-submit UI: window title became 'Genspark Agents' (chat opened), but only interactive elements are 'Refresh Page' button at (1001,761) + empty input at (1001,891). No assistant message bubbles rendered, no '차단' text anywhere in accessibility tree. Hypothesis REJECTED. Recommend next iteration explore: (a) h2_end_stream=3/0 variants, (b) Content-Length/chunked-transfer header, or (c) inspect genspark's actual SSE chunking vs zeta to identify a different field. Screenshot saved at results/files/949/step1.png (68.5KB). Test PC verdict only — dev PC final classification pending.
